<hr>

<div class="inset" style="background-color: yellow;">

'''Help Us Improve Our Documentation and Videos!'''

If you’re struggling to find information on this website, need an overview of SuperMemo features, or would like a new help video, please consider one of these options:
* '''Recommended:''' Add your questions or suggestions directly to relevant pages in [[Reference|SuperMemo Help]] (click the Edit tab to start writing; requires login).
* Submit your ideas or feature requests at [https://supermemopedia.com/wiki/Website_suggestions SuperMemopedia].
* Request a new [https://www.youtube.com/@SuperMemoVideo help video] or send feedback via e-mail (e.g., using '''[[Help]] : [[Help menu#E-mail|E-mail]] : Bug report''').

Your input helps us create clearer documentation and better help videos, reducing support costs and enhancing your experience with SuperMemo.

Thank you for your contributions!

</div>
